message:
🌱 Add ollama: OpenAI API compatibility mission (#971)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-305-openai-api-compatibility",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: OpenAI API compatibility",
+    "description": "OpenAI API compatibility. Requested by 170+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Ollama version and configuration:\n```bash\nollama version\n```\nThis feature requires a working Ollama installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review OpenAI API compatibility",
+        "description": "Ollama now provides built-in OpenAI-compatible API endpoints, enabling it to serve as a drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API. The compatible endpoints include:\n- `/v1/chat/completions` - Chat completions API\n- `/v1/completions` - Text completions API\n\nThis means you can use the Python `openai` package, LlamaIndex, and other OpenAI-compatible clients directly with Ollama."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Configure OpenAI-compatible access",
+        "description": "Point your OpenAI-compatible client to the Ollama server:\n```python\nfrom openai import OpenAI\n\nclient = OpenAI(\n    base_url=\"http://localhost:11434/v1\",\n    api_key=\"ollama\"  # required but unused\n)\n\nresponse = client.chat.completions.create(\n    model=\"llama3\",\n    messages=[{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Hello!\"}]\n)\nprint(response.choices[0].message.content)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the OpenAI-compatible endpoint is working:\n```bash\ncurl http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions \\\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" \\\n  -d '{\"model\": \"llama3\", \"messages\": [{\"role\": \"user\", \"content\": \"Hello\"}]}'\n```\nConfirm you get a valid response in OpenAI API format."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Ollama added built-in OpenAI API compatibility with /v1/chat/completions and /v1/completions endpoints, allowing it to serve as a drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API in client libraries.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
